pr.title: [WIP] SubSixteen: Ternary QAT + Depth Recurrence + TTT (val_bpb pending)

output.summary: Combines int6 per-row quantization with depth recurrence loops plus CastedLinear to pack 32 effective layers into a 16MB artifact.
techniques: int6 per-row quantization with fp16 scales and zstd22 compression
depth recurrence via shared blocks with loop-specific LayerNorm/signals
CastedLinear bf16 matmuls to avoid QAT overhead
